chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No.36 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ Fresh case 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.663/2025 3. For hearing of main case 28.04.2026 Barrister Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, Advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel the question proposed for determination is already covered against the applicant-department by virtue of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Mssrs. Wak Limited Multan Road, Lahore Vs. Collector Central Excise and Sale Tax, Lahore, reported as 2025 PTD 1179. In view whereof, this reference is dismissed in limine. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Asif
